products.name: Power Rider 16 Channel PDU
products.descriptor: 16-channel solid-state PDU, 240 A total, 9–48 VDC, MIL-STD-1275F/461G/810F rated

evidence.snippet:
Power Rider 16 Channel PDU
--------------------------
High-performance, multi-channel circuit breaker with advanced monitoring capabilities

16 configurable channels, each with up to 25A capacity (50A with parallel operation)
Voltage
Operating voltage range: 9-48 VDC

### MIL-STD Compliance
Meets rigorous military standards including MIL-STD-1275F, MIL-STD-461G, and MIL-STD-810F for reliable operation in demanding environments.

products.name: Power Rider 16 Channel PDU Military Grade
products.descriptor: Military-grade 16-channel solid-state PDU with MIL-DTL-5541F coating and MIL-STD-1275F/461G/810F compliance

evidence.snippet:
Power Rider 16 Channel PDU Military Grade
-----------------------------------------
Military-grade circuit breaker designed for mission-critical applications

Protection
Military-grade protection with chemical conversion coating per MIL-DTL-5541F, Designed to meet MIL-STD-1275F/461G/810F standards

### Comprehensive MIL-STD Compliance
Designed and tested to meet rigorous MIL-STD-1275F, MIL-STD-461G, and MIL-STD-810F standards for reliable performance in military applications.
